mapper.sql: id, ticket_id, template_id, current_step_order, approval_status, approver_id, requested_by, submit_comment, decision_comment, submitted_at, decided_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE ticket_approval SET template_id = #{templateId}, current_step_order = #{currentStepOrder}, approval_status = #{approvalStatus.code}, approver_id = #{approverId}, requested_by = #{requestedBy}, submit_comment = #{submitComment}, decision_comment = NULL, submitted_at = #{submittedAt}, decided_at = NULL WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId}
